summary: Comprehensive testing of The Clip Deal Track new registration flow and chat functionality completed. All specified features working correctly with excellent French localization and proper role-based registration forms.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with 'Commencer ici' button - VERIFIED
Role selection modal opens on CTA click - VERIFIED
Step 2 shows registration form with Prénom/Nom/Pseudo fields for Clippeur - VERIFIED
Step 2 shows 'Nom de l'agence' field for Agency - VERIFIED
All 4 role options (Clippeur, Agence, Manager, Client) available in modal
Google OAuth integration button present ('Continuer avec Google')
Professional dark UI theme with proper contrast
Responsive modal design with proper form validation
Backend API health check - 100% success rate
